symbols: kneeling pope in prayer — eternal devotion and supplication before God
downturned torch held by the angel — the extinguishing of earthly life
lions at the base — strength, vigilance, and papal authority
cross held by a standing figure — the Christian hope of resurrection
sarcophagus — the passage from temporal power to eternal judgment
description: A black and white photograph of an elaborate marble funerary monument inside a church. At the top, a robed figure kneels in prayer atop a large sarcophagus with an inscribed plaque. Below, a winged angel figure holds a downturned torch and leans against the tomb in a posture of mourning. On the opposite side, a standing figure holds a tall cross. Two large sculpted lions rest at the base of the monument. The composition is architecturally grand, set within a niche with an arched backdrop.
